title: The heat kernel on curvilinear polygonal domains in surfaces
summary:
We construct the heat kernel on curvilinear polygonal domains in arbitrary
surfaces for Dirichlet, Neumann, and Robin boundary conditions as well as mixed
problems, including those of Zaremba type. We compute the short time asymptotic
expansion of the heat trace and apply this expansion to demonstrate a
collection of results showing that corners are spectral invariants.

AI.tldr: 在任意曲面上的曲线多边形区域上构造了热核，并证明了角点是谱不变量
AI.motivation: 研究曲面上的曲线多边形区域的热核构造问题，特别是带有各种边界条件（Dirichlet、Neumann、Robin）以及混合边界条件（包括Zaremba类型）的情况，旨在探索几何形状的谱不变量特性
AI.techniques: 热核构造技术、短时渐近展开方法、谱几何分析、边界条件处理技术、曲线多边形区域的参数化方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在任意曲面上的曲线多边形区域构造了各种边界条件下的热核；2. 计算了热迹的短时渐近展开；3. 证明了角点是谱不变量，即从谱数据可以确定区域的角点信息
AI.significance: 该工作扩展了热核理论到更一般的几何区域，为谱几何中的逆问题提供了新工具，证明了角点作为几何特征可以通过谱数据恢复，对理解几何形状的谱不变量有重要意义

title: Inverse boundary value problems for polyharmonic operators with   non-smooth coefficients
comment:
26 pages Revised version adds a proof of Lemma 3.6 and minor
  corrections elsewhere Revised version in March 2025 adds a second file which
  provides a correction to the main result of the original paper
summary:
We consider inverse boundary value problems for polyharmonic operators and in
particular, the problem of recovering the coefficients of terms up to order
one. The main interest of our result is that it further relaxes the regularity
required to establish uniqueness. The proof relies on an averaging technique
introduced by Haberman and Tataru for the study of an inverse boundary value
problem for a second order operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了多调和算子逆边界值问题中系数恢复所需的正则性条件可以进一步放宽
AI.motivation: 研究多调和算子的逆边界值问题，特别是恢复一阶项系数的问题，旨在进一步放宽建立唯一性所需的正则性条件
AI.techniques: 使用Haberman和Tataru为二阶算子逆边界值问题引入的平均化技术
AI.main_theorems: 在多调和算子逆边界值问题中，能够以更弱的正则性条件唯一确定一阶项系数
AI.significance: 扩展了逆边界值问题的理论框架，为更一般的微分算子系数恢复提供了新的正则性标准，具有重要的理论意义

title: Well-posedness of the Maxwell equations with nonlinear Ohm law
comment: minor corrections new Remark 5.1 added, two references added
summary:
This paper is concerned with weak solutions (e,h) in L^2 x L^2 of the Maxwell
equations with nonlinear Ohm law and under perfect conductor boundary
conditions. These solutions are defined in terms of integral identities with
appropriate test functions. The main result of our paper is an energy equality
that holds for any weak solution (e,h).

AI.tldr: 建立了非线性欧姆定律下Maxwell方程弱解的能量等式
AI.motivation: 研究具有非线性欧姆定律和理想导体边界条件的Maxwell方程的弱解理论，这些解在L^2空间中定义，需要通过积分恒等式和适当的测试函数来定义
AI.techniques: 使用弱解理论框架，通过积分恒等式定义解，应用适当的测试函数方法，建立能量等式
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果是证明对于任何弱解(e,h)，都成立一个能量等式
AI.significance: 为非线性欧姆定律下的Maxwell方程提供了严格的数学基础，能量等式的建立对于解的正则性、稳定性和物理可解释性具有重要意义

title: Quantitative strong unique continuation for elliptic operators --   application to an inverse spectral problem
summary:
Based on the three-ball inequality and the doubling inequality established in
[23], we quantify the strong unique continuation established by Koch and Tataru
[21] for elliptic operators with unbounded lower-order coefficients. We also
derive a uniform quantitative strong unique continuation for eigenfunctions
that we use to prove that two Dirichlet-Laplace-Beltrami operators are gauge
equivalent whenever their corresponding metrics coincide in the vicinity of the
boundary and their boundary spectral data coincide on a subset of positive
measure.

AI.tldr: 该论文基于三球不等式和加倍不等式，量化了具有无界低阶系数的椭圆算子的强唯一延拓性质，并应用于证明边界附近度量相同且边界谱数据在正测度子集上一致时，两个Dirichlet-Laplace-Beltrami算子的规范等价性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有无界低阶系数的椭圆算子的定量强唯一延拓性质，并将其应用于逆谱问题，特别是证明当两个Laplace-Beltrami算子在边界附近度量相同且边界谱数据在正测度子集上一致时，它们是规范等价的。
AI.techniques: 使用三球不等式和加倍不等式，量化Koch和Tataru的强唯一延拓结果，建立特征函数的均匀定量强唯一延拓性质，并将其应用于逆谱问题中的规范等价性证明。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 量化具有无界低阶系数的椭圆算子的强唯一延拓性质；2. 建立特征函数的均匀定量强唯一延拓；3. 证明当两个Dirichlet-Laplace-Beltrami算子在边界附近度量相同且边界谱数据在正测度子集上一致时，它们是规范等价的。
AI.significance: 将定量唯一延拓理论扩展到具有无界系数的椭圆算子，为逆谱问题提供了新的工具，建立了边界谱数据与算子规范等价性之间的定量关系，对几何逆问题和谱理论有重要意义。

title: Magnetic Reconnection in Magnetohydrodynamics
summary:
We provide examples of periodic solutions (in both 2 and 3 dimension) of the
Magnetohydrodynamics equations such that the topology of the magnetic lines
changes during the evolution. This phenomenon, known as magnetic reconnection,
is relevant for physicists, in particular in the study of highly conducting
plasmas. Although numerical and experimental evidences exist, analytical
examples of magnetic reconnection were not known.

AI.tldr: 首次为磁流体动力学方程构造了拓扑磁力线重连的解析周期解
AI.motivation: 磁重连是等离子体物理中的重要现象，指磁力线拓扑结构在演化中发生变化，虽然已有数值和实验证据，但缺乏解析例子
AI.techniques: 构造二维和三维磁流体动力学方程的周期解，通过精确解展示磁力线拓扑变化
AI.main_theorems: 构造了二维和三维磁流体动力学方程的周期解，证明在这些解中磁力线的拓扑结构随时间演化发生变化
AI.significance: 首次为磁重连现象提供解析证明，填补了理论空白，为理解等离子体物理中的磁重连机制提供了数学基础

title: Multiple positive solutions for a double phase system with singular   nonlinearity
summary:
In this paper, we study a class of double phase systems which contain the
singular and mixed nonlinear terms. Unlike the single equation, the mixed
nonlinear terms make the problem more complicate. The geometry of the fibering
mapping has multiple possibilities. To overcome the difficulties posed by the
mixed nonlinear terms, we need to repeatedly construct concave functions,
discuss different cases, and use the properties of concave functions and basic
inequalities such as Holder inequality, Poincares inequality and Youngs
inequality. By the use of the Nehari manifold, the existence and multiplicity
of positive solutions which have nonnegative energy are obtained. It is worth
mentioning that we note the existence of saddle point solution(a station point
that is not a local minimum), see Remark 3.1.

AI.tldr: 研究含奇异项和混合非线性项的双相系统，通过Nehari流形方法获得具有非负能量的正解存在性和多重性
AI.motivation: 研究一类包含奇异项和混合非线性项的双相系统，这类系统比单方程更复杂，混合非线性项导致纤维映射几何结构具有多种可能性，需要克服由此带来的困难
AI.techniques: 使用Nehari流形方法，反复构造凹函数，讨论不同情况，利用凹函数性质以及Hölder不等式、Poincaré不等式和Young不等式等基本不等式
AI.main_theorems: 获得了具有非负能量的正解的存在性和多重性，特别指出了鞍点解（不是局部极小的驻点）的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了双相系统理论，处理了含奇异项和混合非线性项的复杂情形，为这类非线性偏微分方程系统提供了新的存在性结果和分析方法

title: Sharp Hadamard local well-posedness, enhanced uniqueness and pointwise   continuation criterion for the incompressible free boundary Euler equations
comment: 118 pages, updated based on referee comments
summary:
We provide a complete local well-posedness theory in $H^s$ based Sobolev
spaces for the free boundary incompressible Euler equations with zero surface
tension on a connected fluid domain. Our well-posedness theory includes: (i)
Local well-posedness in the Hadamard sense, i.e., local existence, uniqueness,
and the first proof of continuous dependence on the data, all in low regularity
Sobolev spaces; (ii) Enhanced uniqueness: Our uniqueness result holds at the
level of the Lipschitz norm of the velocity and the $C^{1,\frac{1}{2}}$
regularity of the free surface; (iii) Stability bounds: We construct a
nonlinear functional which measures, in a suitable sense, the distance between
two solutions (even when defined on different domains) and we show that this
distance is propagated by the flow; (iv) Energy estimates: We prove refined,
essentially scale invariant energy estimates for solutions, relying on a newly
constructed family of elliptic estimates; (v) Continuation criterion: We give
the first proof of a sharp continuation criterion in the physically relevant
pointwise norms, at the level of scaling. In essence, we show that solutions
can be continued as long as the velocity is in $L_T^1W^{1,\infty}$ and the free
surface is in $L_T^1C^{1,\frac{1}{2}}$, which is at the same level as the
Beale-Kato-Majda criterion for the boundaryless case; (vi) A novel proof of the
construction of regular solutions.
  Our entire approach is in the Eulerian framework and can be adapted to work
in more general fluid domains.

AI.tldr: 建立了零表面张力自由边界不可压缩欧拉方程在低正则Sobolev空间中的完整局部适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究自由边界不可压缩欧拉方程（零表面张力）的适定性问题，该方程描述具有移动自由边界的理想流体运动，是流体力学中的基本模型
AI.techniques: 欧拉框架方法、新构造的椭圆估计族、非线性泛函构造、尺度不变能量估计、Lipschitz范数和C^{1,1/2}正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: (i) Hadamard意义下的局部适定性；(ii) 增强的唯一性；(iii) 稳定性界；(iv) 精细能量估计；(v) 尖锐的延拓准则；(vi) 正则解构造的新证明
AI.significance: 首次在低正则Sobolev空间中建立了完整的适定性理论，提供了连续依赖性证明和尺度不变的延拓准则，将无边界情况的Beale-Kato-Majda准则推广到自由边界情形

title: Hydrodynamic limits from the self-organized kinetic system for body   attitude coordination
summary:
The self-organized kinetic system for body attitude coordination (SOKB) was
recently derived by Degond et al. (Math. Models Methods Appl. Sci. 27(6),
1005-1049, 2017). This system describe a new collective motion for multi-agents
dynamics, where each agent is described by its position and body attitude:
agents travel at a constant speed in a given direction and their body can
rotate round it adopting different configurations (representing by rotation
matrix in $\mathrm{SO(3)}$). In this paper, we study the hydrodynamic limit of
the scaled SOKB system with the constant intensity of coordination by employing
the Generalized Collision Invariants (GCI)-based Hilbert expansion approach.
The limit is the self-organized hydrodynamic model for body attitude
coordination (SOHB). In spherical coordinates, the SOHB system is singular. To
avoid this coordinate singularity, we transfer SOHB system into a non-singular
form by stereographic projection. This work provides the first analytically
rigorous justification of the modeling and asymptotic analysis in Degond et al.
(Math. Models Methods Appl. Sci. 27(6), 1005-1049, 2017).

AI.tldr: 本文通过基于广义碰撞不变量的Hilbert展开方法，严格证明了自组织体姿态协调动力学系统在流体力学极限下的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究Degond等人提出的自组织体姿态协调动力学系统(SOKB)的流体力学极限，为多智能体动力学中体姿态协调的集体运动模型提供严格的理论基础。
AI.techniques: 基于广义碰撞不变量的Hilbert展开方法、球面坐标到立体投影坐标的变换以避免奇异性、流体力学极限分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了标度化SOKB系统在协调强度常数下的流体力学极限收敛于自组织体姿态协调流体力学模型(SOHB)，并通过立体投影消除了球面坐标中的奇异性。
AI.significance: 首次为Degond等人的建模和渐近分析提供了严格的理论证明，建立了微观动力学与宏观流体力学模型之间的数学联系，为体姿态协调的集体运动研究奠定了理论基础。

title: The porous medium equation on noncompact manifolds with nonnegative   Ricci curvature: a Green function approach
comment: Minor modifications included, to appear in JDE
summary:
We consider the porous medium equation (PME) on complete noncompact manifolds
$M$ of nonnegative Ricci curvature. We require nonparabolicity of the manifold
and construct a natural space $X$ of functions, strictly larger than $L^1$, in
which the Green function on $M$ appears as a weight, such that the PME admits a
solution in the weak dual (i.e. potential) sense whenever the initial datum
$u_0$ is nonnegative and belongs to $X$. Smoothing estimates are also proved to
hold both for $L^1$ data, where they take into account the volume growth of
Riemannian balls giving rise to bounds which are shown to be sharp in a
suitable sense, and for data belonging to $X$ as well.

AI.tldr: 在非负Ricci曲率的非紧非抛物流形上，构造了包含L^1的加权函数空间X，证明了多孔介质方程在该空间中的弱对偶解存在性和光滑性估计。
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质方程（PME）在非紧非抛物流形上的适定性问题，特别是在非负Ricci曲率条件下，需要构造比L^1更大的函数空间来容纳更广泛的初始数据。
AI.techniques: 使用Green函数作为权重的加权函数空间构造，弱对偶（势）解方法，体积增长估计，以及针对L^1数据和加权空间数据的光滑性估计技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造了以Green函数为权重的函数空间X（严格包含L^1）；2. 证明了当初始数据u0非负且属于X时，PME存在弱对偶解；3. 建立了L^1数据和X数据的光滑性估计，并证明了在适当意义下的尖锐性。
AI.significance: 扩展了多孔介质方程在非紧流形上的适定性理论，提供了处理比L^1更广泛初始数据的新框架，对几何分析与偏微分方程的交叉研究有重要意义。

title: Sign-changing bubbling solutions for an exponential nonlinearity in   $\mathbb{R}^2$
summary:
Very differently from those perturbative techniques of Deng-Musso in [21], we
use the assumption of a $C^1$-stable critical point to construct positive or
sign-changing solutions with arbitrary $m$ isolated bubbles to the boundary
value problem $-\Delta u=\lambda u|u|^{p-2}e^{|u|^p}$ under homogeneous
Dirichlet boundary condition in a bounded, smooth planar domain $\Omega$, when
$0<p<2$ and $\lambda>0$ is a small but free parameter. We prove that for any
$0<p<1$ the delicate energy expansion of these bubbling solutions always
converges to $4\pi m$ from below, but for any $1<p<2$ the energy always
converges to $4\pi m$ from above, where the latter case sharply recurs a result
of De Marchis-Malchiodi-Martinazzi-Thizy in [22] involving concentration and
compactness properties at any critical energy level $4\pi m$ of positive
bubbling solutions. A sufficient condition on the intersection between the
nodal line of these sign-changing solutions and the boundary of the domain is
founded. Moreover, for $\lambda$ small enough, we prove that when $\Omega$ is
an arbitrary bounded domain, this problem has not only at least two pairs of
bubbling solutions which change sign exactly once and whose nodal lines
intersect the boundary, but also a bubbling solution which changes sign exactly
twice or three times; when $\Omega$ has an axial symmetry, this problem has a
bubbling solution which alternately changes sign arbitrarily many times along
the axis of symmetry through the domain.

AI.tldr: 在二维有界光滑区域中，对Trudinger-Moser型非线性项构造具有任意多个孤立气泡的正解和变号解
AI.motivation: 研究具有Trudinger-Moser型非线性项$-\Delta u=\lambda u|u|^{p-2}e^{|u|^p}$的Dirichlet边值问题，其中$0<p<2$，$\lambda>0$是小参数。不同于Deng-Musso的扰动方法，本文利用$C^1$-稳定临界点假设构造具有任意$m$个孤立气泡的解，并分析能量收敛行为
AI.techniques: 使用$C^1$-稳定临界点构造方法（非扰动技术），进行精细的能量展开分析，研究气泡解的收敛行为，分析变号解节点线与边界的交点条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对任意$0<p<1$，气泡解能量从下方收敛到$4\pi m$；对任意$1<p<2$，能量从上方收敛到$4\pi m$；2. 建立变号解节点线与边界交点的充分条件；3. 证明任意有界区域存在至少两对变号一次且节点线与边界相交的气泡解，以及变号两次或三次的气泡解；4. 在轴对称区域中构造沿对称轴交替变号任意多次的气泡解
AI.significance: 为Trudinger-Moser型非线性问题提供了新的构造方法，揭示了$p$值对能量收敛方向的关键影响，建立了变号解节点线与边界交点的理论条件，扩展了De Marchis-Malchiodi-Martinazzi-Thizy关于$4\pi m$临界能量水平的结果

title: $H^2$-regularity for stationary and non-stationary Bingham problems with   perfect slip boundary condition
summary:
$H^2$-spatial regularity of stationary and non-stationary problems for
Bingham fluids formulated with the pseudo-stress tensor is discussed. The
problem is mathematically described by an elliptic or parabolic variational
inequality of the second kind, to which weak solvability in the Sobolev space
$H^1$ is well known. However, higher regularity up to the boundary in a bounded
smooth domain seems to remain open. This paper indeed shows such
$H^2$-regularity if the problems are supplemented with the so-called perfect
slip boundary condition and if the yield stress vanishes on the boundary. For
the stationary Bingham--Stokes problem, the key of the proof lies in a priori
estimates for a regularized problem avoiding investigation of higher pressure
regularity, which seems difficult to get in the presence of a singular
diffusion term. The $H^2$-regularity for the stationary case is then directly
applied to establish strong solvability of the non-stationary
Bingham--Navier--Stokes problem, based on discretization in time and on the
truncation of the nonlinear convection term.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有完美滑移边界条件和边界屈服应力为零的Bingham流体伪应力张量问题的H^2空间正则性
AI.motivation: Bingham流体（屈服应力流体）的数学模型通常用二阶变分不等式描述，已知在Sobolev空间H^1中存在弱解，但边界附近的高阶正则性（特别是H^2正则性）一直是一个开放问题。
AI.techniques: 1. 正则化问题的先验估计；2. 避免研究高阶压力正则性（由于奇异扩散项存在困难）；3. 时间离散化；4. 非线性对流项的截断；5. 完美滑移边界条件的应用
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在完美滑移边界条件和边界屈服应力为零的条件下，证明了稳态Bingham-Stokes问题的H^2正则性；2. 将稳态结果应用于非稳态Bingham-Navier-Stokes问题，建立了强解的存在性
AI.significance: 首次获得了Bingham流体伪应力张量问题的边界H^2正则性，解决了该领域的一个长期开放问题，为非牛顿流体力学的高阶数值模拟提供了理论基础

title: Smoothing effects and extinction in finite time for fractional fast   diffusions on Riemannian manifolds
comment: Minor revisions. To appear in J. Geometric Anal
summary:
We study nonnegative solutions to the Cauchy problem for the Fractional Fast
Diffusion Equation on a suitable class of connected, noncompact Riemannian
manifolds. This parabolic equation is both singular and nonlocal: the diffusion
is driven by the (spectral) fractional Laplacian on the manifold, while the
nonlinearity is a concave power that makes the diffusion singular, so that
solutions lose mass and may extinguish in finite time. Existence of mild
solutions follows by nowadays standard nonlinear semigroups techniques, and we
use these solutions as the building blocks for a more general class of
so-called weak dual solutions, which allow for data both in the usual $L^1$
space and in a larger weighted space, determined in terms of the fractional
Green function. We focus in particular on a priori smoothing estimates (also in
weighted $L^p$ spaces) for a quite large class of weak dual solutions. We also
show pointwise lower bounds for solutions, showing in particular that solutions
have infinite speed of propagation. Finally, we start the study of how
solutions extinguish in finite time, providing suitable sharp extinction rates.

AI.tldr: 研究了黎曼流形上分数阶快速扩散方程的非负解，建立了弱对偶解理论、正则性估计、无穷传播速度以及有限时间熄灭的尖锐速率。
AI.motivation: 研究非紧黎曼流形上分数阶快速扩散方程的Cauchy问题，该方程同时具有奇异性和非局部性：扩散由流形上的（谱）分数阶拉普拉斯算子驱动，非线性项是凹幂次使得扩散奇异，导致解可能丢失质量并在有限时间内熄灭。
AI.techniques: 使用非线性半群技术构造温和解，以此为基础建立更一般的弱对偶解理论；在加权L^p空间中进行正则性估计；证明点态下界以显示无穷传播速度；分析有限时间熄灭的尖锐速率。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了温和解和弱对偶解的存在性理论；2) 在加权L^p空间中获得了先验光滑估计；3) 证明了解的点态下界，显示无穷传播速度；4) 给出了有限时间熄灭的尖锐速率估计。
AI.significance: 将分数阶快速扩散方程的研究从欧氏空间推广到黎曼流形，建立了完整的解理论框架，为奇异非局部抛物方程在几何背景下的研究提供了重要工具，对理解分数阶扩散过程的几何效应有重要意义。

title: Microscopic, mesoscopic, and macroscopic descriptions of the Euler   alignment system with adaptive communication strength
summary:
This is a continuation of our previous joint work on the $\st$-model
in[\textit{Well-posedness and long time behavior of the Euler Alignment System
with adaptive communication strength}, accepted at the Abel Symposium
Proceedings, also arXiv:2310.00269, 2023]. The $\st$-model, introduced by the
first author in [\textit{Environmental averaging}. EMS Surv. Math. Sci., 11
(2024), no. 2, 277413],is an alignment model with the property that the
strength of the alignment force, $\st$, is transported along an averaged
velocity field. The transport of the strength is designed so that it admits an
$e$-quantity, $e = \partial_x u + \st$, which controls regularity in 1D
similarly to the classical Cucker-Smale case. The utility of the $\st$-model is
that it has the versatility to behave qualitatively like the Motsch-Tadmor
model, for which global regularity theory is not known.
  This paper aims to put the $\st$-model on firmer physical grounds by
formulating and justifying the microscopic and mesoscopic descriptions from
which it arises. A distinctive feature of the microscopic system is that it is
a discrete-continuous system: the position and velocity of the particles are
discrete objects, while the strength is an active continuum scalar function. We
establish a rigorous passage from the microscopic to the mesoscopic description
via the Mean Field Limit and from the mesoscopic to the macroscopic description
in the monokinetic and Maxwellian limiting regimes. We also address the
long-time behavior of the kinetic Fokker-Planck-Alignment equation by
establishing the relaxation to the Maxwellian in 1D when the velocity averaging
is given by the Favre filtration. As a supplement to the numerical results
already presented in our previous work, we provide additional numerical
evidence, via a particle simulation, that the $\st$-model behaves qualitatively
like the Motsch-Tadmor model.

AI.tldr: 该论文为$\st$-模型建立了微观和介观描述，并通过平均场极限等数学工具严格推导了宏观方程，同时研究了动力学方程的长时间行为。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在将$\st$-模型建立在更坚实的物理基础上，通过从微观和介观描述出发来推导该模型，从而为其提供物理合理性。$\st$-模型是一种对齐模型，其对齐强度$\st$沿着平均速度场输运，具有$e$-量$e = \partial_x u + \st$来控制一维正则性。该模型具有Motsch-Tadmor模型的定性行为，而后者的全局正则性理论尚未建立。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：离散-连续系统的微观描述、平均场极限（Mean Field Limit）、单动量和Maxwellian极限机制、Favre滤波的速度平均、粒子模拟数值验证、动力学Fokker-Planck-对齐方程的长时间行为分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了从微观到介观描述的严格平均场极限；2. 在单动量和Maxwellian极限机制下从介观推导到宏观描述；3. 证明了在Favre滤波下，一维动力学Fokker-Planck-对齐方程松弛到Maxwellian分布；4. 通过粒子模拟提供了$\st$-模型与Motsch-Tadmor模型定性行为相似的数值证据。
AI.significance: 为$\st$-模型提供了坚实的物理基础，建立了从微观到宏观的多尺度数学框架，为解决Motsch-Tadmor模型的全局正则性问题提供了新的研究途径，对齐模型理论的发展具有重要意义。

title: Schauder Estimates for Germs by Scaling
comment:
Added section on discrete elliptic equations and appendix on a
  discrete Liouville theorem
summary:
In this expository note, we show that the blow-up arguments of L. Simon adapt
well to the corresponding Schauder theory of germs used in the study of
singular SPDEs. We illustrate this through some representative examples. As in
the classical PDE framework, the argument relies only on the scaling properties
of the germ semi-norms and the Liouville principle for the operator.

AI.tldr: 将L. Simon的爆破论证方法推广到奇异随机偏微分方程研究中的Schauder理论框架
AI.motivation: 研究奇异随机偏微分方程(SPDEs)中的Schauder理论，将经典PDE理论中的爆破论证方法扩展到随机情形
AI.techniques: L. Simon的爆破论证方法、Schauder理论、尺度分析、Liouville原理、半范数尺度性质
AI.main_theorems: 证明了爆破论证方法可适应奇异SPDEs中的Schauder理论框架，并通过代表性示例展示了该方法的应用
AI.significance: 为奇异随机偏微分方程的正则性理论提供了新的分析工具，连接了经典PDE理论和现代随机分析

title: Generalized Doubly Parabolic Keller-Segel System with Fractional   Diffusion
summary:
The Keller-Segel model is a system of partial differential equations that
describes the movement of cells or organisms in response to chemical signals, a
phenomenon known as chemotaxis. In this study, we analyze a doubly parabolic
Keller-Segel system in the whole space $\mathbb{R}^d$, $d\geq 2$, where both
cellular and chemical diffusion are governed by fractional Laplacians with
distinct exponents. This system generalizes the classical Keller-Segel model by
introducing superdiffusion, a form of anomalous diffusion. This extension
accounts for nonlocal diffusive effects observed in experimental settings,
particularly in environments with sparse targets. We establish results on the
local well-posedness of mild solutions for this generalized system and global
well-posedness under smallness assumptions on the initial conditions in
$L^p(\mathbb{R}^d)$. Furthermore, we characterize the asymptotic behavior of
the solution.

AI.tldr: 研究具有不同分数阶拉普拉斯算子的双抛物型Keller-Segel系统的适定性和渐近行为
AI.motivation: 经典Keller-Segel模型描述细胞对化学信号的趋化运动，但实际实验中观察到非局部扩散效应（超扩散），特别是在稀疏目标环境中，因此需要引入分数阶拉普拉斯算子来建模这种反常扩散现象。
AI.techniques: 使用分数阶拉普拉斯算子理论、温和解方法、Banach不动点定理、$L^p$空间估计、小初值条件下的全局适定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 广义Keller-Segel系统温和解的局部适定性；2. 在$L^p(\mathbb{R}^d)$中小初值条件下的全局适定性；3. 解的渐近行为刻画
AI.significance: 将经典趋化模型推广到分数阶扩散情形，更好地描述生物系统中的反常扩散现象，为理解非局部扩散机制下的趋化动力学提供理论框架

title: On the optimal control of viscous Cahn-Hilliard systems with hyperbolic   relaxation of the chemical potential
comment:
Key words: Optimal control, Cahn--Hilliard system, hyperbolic
  relaxation, first-order optimality conditions
summary:
In this paper, we study an optimal control problem for a viscous
Cahn--Hilliard system with zero Neumann boundary conditions in which a
hyperbolic relaxation term involving the second time derivative of the chemical
potential has been added to the first equation of the system. For the
initial-boundary value problem of this system, results concerning
well-posedness, continuous dependence and regularity are known. We show
Fr\'echet differentiability of the associated control-to-state operator, study
the associated adjoint state system, and derive first-order necessary
optimality conditions. Concerning the nonlinearities driving the system, we can
include the case of logarithmic potentials. In addition, we perform an
asymptotic analysis of the optimal control problem as the relaxation
coefficient approaches zero.

AI.tldr: 研究了带双曲松弛项的粘性Cahn-Hilliard系统的最优控制问题，建立了控制-状态算子的Fréchet可微性并推导了一阶最优性条件。
AI.motivation: 研究带双曲松弛项的粘性Cahn-Hilliard系统的最优控制问题，该系统在化学势方程中添加了二阶时间导数项，用于描述更复杂的相分离动力学。
AI.techniques: 使用最优控制理论、Fréchet导数分析、伴随状态系统方法、渐近分析技术，以及对数势函数的处理。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了控制-状态算子的Fréchet可微性，建立了伴随状态系统，推导了一阶必要最优性条件，并分析了松弛系数趋于零时的渐近行为。
AI.significance: 扩展了Cahn-Hilliard系统的最优控制理论，为带双曲松弛项的相分离模型提供了控制理论基础，具有实际应用价值。

title: Global Well-Posedness for the 3D Navier-Stokes Equations under   Logarithmically Improved Criteria: Connections to Turbulence Theory
summary:
This paper introduces a novel class of initial data for which the
three-dimensional incompressible Navier--Stokes equations yield unique
global-in-time solutions. Building on a logarithmically improved regularity
criterion, we impose a logarithmically subcritical condition on the initial
data. Specifically, if \[ u_0 \in L^2(\mathbb{R}^3) \quad \text{and} \quad
\|(-\Delta)^{s/2}u_0\|_{L^q(\mathbb{R}^3)} \le
\frac{C_0}{\Bigl(1+\log\bigl(e+\|u_0\|_{\dot{H}^s}\bigr)\Bigr)^{\delta}}, \]
for some $s \in (1/2,1)$ under appropriate scaling, then the corresponding
solution exists globally and is unique. The proof employs refined commutator
estimates for the fractional Laplacian together with new energy methods that
exploit this logarithmic improvement to prevent singularity formation.
  Furthermore, we establish links between these improved criteria and
turbulence theory. We derive precise relationships connecting the regularity
conditions with turbulent intermittency, showing that the logarithmic
enhancements correspond to anomalous scaling exponents in the turbulent energy
spectrum. Additionally, we characterize the local structure of potential
singularities and provide tight bounds on the energy flux in turbulent
cascades. This approach bridges the gap between subcritical and critical
regularity for the Navier--Stokes equations and offers a robust mathematical
foundation for key phenomena observed in turbulence.

AI.tldr: 提出了三维不可压Navier-Stokes方程的一类新型初值条件，确保全局唯一解存在，并建立了与湍流理论的联系。
AI.motivation: Navier-Stokes方程全局正则性问题是千禧年难题之一，本文旨在寻找比传统临界空间更弱的初值条件，确保解全局存在且唯一，同时探索与湍流现象的数学联系。
AI.techniques: 使用对数改进的正则性准则、分数阶拉普拉斯算子的精细交换子估计、新能量方法，以及湍流间歇性分析和异常标度指数理论。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：当初值u₀满足对数次临界条件（‖(-Δ)^{s/2}u₀‖_{L^q} ≤ C₀/(1+log(e+‖u₀‖_{Ḣ^s}))^δ，其中s∈(1/2,1)），则三维Navier-Stokes方程存在全局唯一解。
AI.significance: 填补了次临界与临界正则性之间的空白，为Navier-Stokes方程全局正则性问题提供了新视角，建立了湍流理论中异常标度指数的严格数学基础，深化了对湍流能量级联的理解。

title: Diffusion-aggregation equations and volume-preserving mean curvature   flows
summary:
The Patlak-Keller-Segel system of equations (PKS) is a classical example of
aggregation-diffusion equation. It describes the aggregation of some organisms
via chemotaxis, limited by some nonlinear diffusion. It is known that for some
choice of this nonlinear diffusion, the PKS model asymptotically leads to phase
separation and mean-curvature driven free boundary problems. In this paper, we
focus on the Elliptic-Parabolic PKS model and we obtain the first unconditional
convergence result in dimension $2$ and $3$ towards the volume preserving
mean-curvature flow. This work builds up on previous results that were obtained
under the assumption that phase separation does not cause energy loss in the
limit. In order to avoid this assumption, we rely on Brakke type formulation of
the mean-curvature flow and a reinterpretation of the problem as an Allen-Cahn
equation with a nonlocal forcing term.

AI.tldr: 首次在2维和3维中获得了椭圆-抛物Patlak-Keller-Segel系统无条件收敛于体积保持平均曲率流的结果
AI.motivation: Patlak-Keller-Segel系统是经典的聚集-扩散方程，描述生物体通过趋化性聚集，受非线性扩散限制。某些非线性扩散下，PKS模型渐近导致相分离和平均曲率驱动的自由边界问题。先前结果需要假设相分离在极限中不引起能量损失，本文旨在避免这一假设。
AI.techniques: 采用Brakke型平均曲率流公式化方法，将问题重新解释为带有非局部强迫项的Allen-Cahn方程
AI.main_theorems: 首次在维度2和3中获得了椭圆-抛物PKS模型无条件收敛于体积保持平均曲率流的结果，无需假设相分离不引起能量损失
AI.significance: 这是该领域第一个无条件收敛结果，建立了PKS系统与平均曲率流之间的严格数学联系，为相分离现象和自由边界问题提供了新的理论框架

title: Asymptotic evaluation of three-dimensional integrals with singularities   in application to wave phenomena
summary:
We consider a three-dimensional Fourier integral in which the exponent in the
exponential factor is the product of some phase function and a large parameter.
The asymptotics of this integral is sought when the large parameter tends to
infinity. In the one-dimensional case, the asymptotics of such an integral is
constructed by the points of stationary phase and singularities of the
integrand. The three-dimensional case is more complicated: special points such
as points of stationary phase in the domain, on singularity, on the crossing of
singularities, points of triple crossing of singularities, and also conical
points of the singularities, can contribute to the asymptotics. For all these
types of singularities, topological conditions for the existence of nonzero
asymptotics are constructed, and the asymptotics themselves are derived. The
proposed technique is tested on the example of the classical problem of Kelvin
waves on the surface of a deep fluid behind a towed body.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维傅里叶积分在奇点、驻相点等特殊点处的渐近展开理论，并应用于深水拖体开尔文波问题
AI.motivation: 研究三维傅里叶积分在大参数趋于无穷时的渐近行为，一维情况已有驻相法和奇点分析，但三维情况更复杂，需要考虑多种特殊点的贡献
AI.techniques: 傅里叶积分渐近分析、驻相法、奇点理论、拓扑条件分析、三维积分渐近展开
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维傅里叶积分在各种特殊点（驻相点、奇点、奇点交叉、三重交叉点、奇点锥点）处非零渐近的拓扑条件，并推导了相应的渐近展开式
AI.significance: 为三维波动问题和奇点理论提供了新的渐近分析工具，成功应用于经典流体力学问题——深水拖体后的开尔文波，验证了方法的有效性

title: Nonlinear asymptotic stability of 2D Taylor-Couette flow in the exterior   disk
summary:
In this paper, we consider the asymptotic stability of the 2D Taylor-Couette
flow in the exterior disk, with a small kinematic viscosity $\nu \ll 1$ and a
large rotation coefficient $|B|$. Due to the degeneracy of the Taylor-Couette
flow at infinity, we cannot expect the solution to decay exponentially in a
space-time decoupled manner. As stated in previous work \cite{LZZ-25}, even
space-time coupled exponential decay can not be expected, and at most, we can
obtain space-time coupled polynomial decay. To handle the space-time coupled
decay multiplier, the previous time-independent resolvent estimate methods no
longer work. Therefore, this paper introduces time-dependent resolvent
estimates to deal with the space-time coupled decay multiplier $\Lambda_k$. We
remark that the choice of $\Lambda_k$ is not unique, here we just provide one
way to construct it. Finally, as an application, we derive a transition
threshold bound of $\frac12$, which is the same as that for the Taylor-Couette
flow in the bounded region.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入时间依赖的预解估计方法，处理了二维Taylor-Couette流在外部区域中的渐近稳定性问题，得到了与有界区域相同的1/2转换阈值。
AI.motivation: 研究二维Taylor-Couette流在外部圆盘区域中的渐近稳定性问题，其中涉及小运动粘度ν≪1和大旋转系数|B|。由于Taylor-Couette流在无穷远处的退化性，解无法以时空解耦的方式指数衰减，甚至时空耦合的指数衰减也无法实现，最多只能获得时空耦合的多项式衰减。
AI.techniques: 引入时间依赖的预解估计方法处理时空耦合的衰减乘子Λ_k，克服了传统时间无关预解估计方法在处理此类问题时的局限性。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了外部区域中Taylor-Couette流的渐近稳定性结果，推导出了转换阈值边界为1/2，这与有界区域中的结果相同。
AI.significance: 首次将时间依赖的预解估计方法应用于处理外部区域中流体稳定性的时空耦合衰减问题，为处理类似退化性问题提供了新的技术框架，扩展了Taylor-Couette流稳定性理论的应用范围。

title: A Polynomial Rate of Convergence for the Dirichlet Problem on   Orthodiagonal Maps
summary:
We extend recent work of Gurel-Gurevich--Jerison--Nachmias (2020) and
Bou-Rabee--Gwynne (2024) by showing that as the mesh of our lattice tends to
$0$, we have a polynomial rate of convergence for the Dirichlet problem on
orthodiagonal maps with H\"older boundary data to its continuous counterpart.
  The key idea is that the convolution of a discrete harmonic function on an
orthodiagonal map with a smooth mollifier has small Laplacian and so is
``almost harmonic." This also allows us to show that discrete harmonic
functions on orthodiagonal maps are Lipschitz in the bulk on a mesoscopic
scale.

AI.tldr: 证明了正交对角映射上离散调和函数在网格趋于零时以多项式速率收敛到连续Dirichlet问题解
AI.motivation: 扩展Gurel-Gurevich--Jerison--Nachmias (2020)和Bou-Rabee--Gwynne (2024)的工作，研究正交对角映射上离散Dirichlet问题在网格趋于零时向连续问题的收敛性
AI.techniques: 使用光滑磨光算子卷积技术，证明离散调和函数与磨光算子的卷积具有小Laplacian，从而近似调和；建立离散调和函数在介观尺度上的Lipschitz性质
AI.main_theorems: 1. 正交对角映射上Dirichlet问题对Hölder边界数据以多项式速率收敛到连续解；2. 离散调和函数在体区域具有介观尺度上的Lipschitz连续性
AI.significance: 为离散复分析中的收敛性理论提供新结果，建立了离散调和函数与连续调和函数之间的定量收敛速率，对离散复分析和随机平面映射理论有重要意义

title: Uniqueness of Ricci flow with scaling invariant estimates
summary:
In this work, we prove uniqueness for complete non-compact Ricci flow with
scaling invariant curvature bound. This generalizes the earlier work of
Chen-Zhu, Kotschwar and covers most of the example of Ricci flows with
unbounded curvature. In dimension three, we use it to show that complete Ricci
flow starting from uniformly non-collapsed, non-negatively curved manifold is
unique, extending the strong uniqueness Theorem of Chen. This is based on
solving Ricci-harmonic map heat flow in unbounded curvature background.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有尺度不变曲率界的完备非紧Ricci流的唯一性，并将其应用于三维非负曲率流形的唯一性证明
AI.motivation: 研究完备非紧Ricci流的唯一性问题，特别是针对具有无界曲率的流形，推广Chen-Zhu和Kotschwar的先前工作
AI.techniques: 使用Ricci-调和映射热流方法，在无界曲率背景下求解，结合尺度不变曲率界条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 具有尺度不变曲率界的完备非紧Ricci流唯一性定理；2. 三维一致非塌缩、非负曲率流形上完备Ricci流的唯一性定理，推广了Chen的强唯一性定理
AI.significance: 解决了无界曲率Ricci流的唯一性问题，为研究奇异流形上的Ricci流提供了理论基础，在几何流理论中具有重要意义

title: Mass concentration of minimizers for $L^2$-subcritical Kirchhoff energy   functional in bounded domains
summary:
We are concerned with $L^2$-constraint minimizers for the Kirchhoff
functional $$ E_b(u)=\int_{\Omega}|\nabla
u|^2\mathrm{d}x+\frac{b}{2}\left(\int_\Omega|\nabla
u|^2\mathrm{d}x\right)^2+\int_\Omega
V(x)u^2\mathrm{d}x-\frac{\beta}{2}\int_{\Omega}|u|^4\mathrm{d}x, $$ where
$b>0$, $\beta>0$ and $V(x)$ is a trapping potential in a bounded domain
$\Omega$ of $\mathbb R^2$. As is well known that minimizers exist for any $b>0$
and $\beta>0$, while the minimizers do not exist for $b=0$ and
$\beta\geq\beta^*$, where $\beta^*=\int_{\mathbb R^2}|Q|^2\mathrm{d}x$ and $Q$
is the unique positive solution of $-\Delta u+u-u^3=0$ in $\mathbb R^2$. In
this paper, we show that for $\beta=\beta^*$, the energy converges to 0, but
for $\beta>\beta^*$, the minimal energy will diverge to $-\infty$ as
$b\searrow0$. Further, we give the refined limit behaviors and energy estimates
of minimizers as $b\searrow0$ for $\beta=\beta^*$ or $\beta>\beta^*$. For both
cases, we obtain that the mass of minimizers concentrates either at an inner
point or near the boundary of $\Omega$, depending on whether $V(x)$ attains its
flattest global minimum at an inner point of $\Omega$ or not. Meanwhile, we
find an interesting phenomenon that the blow-up rate when the minimizers
concentrate near the boundary of $\Omega$ is faster than concentration at an
interior point if $\beta=\beta^*$, but the blow-up rates remain consistent if
$\beta>\beta^*$.

AI.tldr: 研究了Kirchhoff泛函在二维有界区域中约束极小元的渐近行为，特别关注参数b趋于0时极小元的存在性、能量估计和集中现象。
AI.motivation: 研究Kirchhoff泛函约束极小元在参数b趋于0时的渐近行为，该问题源于非线性薛定谔方程中的基态解分析，特别关注临界参数β=β*和超临界参数β>β*时极小元的存在性、能量发散和集中现象。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、能量估计、集中紧性原理、尺度变换分析、边界层理论，以及通过比较内点和边界处势能函数的平坦性来确定集中位置。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当β=β*时，能量收敛到0；当β>β*时，最小能量发散到-∞（b→0）。2. 给出了b→0时极小元的精细极限行为和能量估计。3. 发现极小元的质量集中在Ω的内点或边界附近，取决于V(x)的最平坦全局最小值位置。4. 发现当β=β*时边界集中比内点集中的爆破速率更快，而β>β*时爆破速率一致。
AI.significance: 该研究揭示了Kirchhoff泛函约束极小元在参数极限下的精细渐近行为，为非线性薛定谔方程基态解的分析提供了新见解，特别在临界参数附近和边界集中现象方面有重要理论意义。

title: A simple proof of reverse Sobolev inequalities on the sphere and Sobolev   trace inequalities on the unit ball
summary:
Frank et al. (J. Funct. Anal., 2022) stated that there is no relation between
the reversed Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev (HLS) inequalities and reverse Sobolev
inequalities. However, we demonstrate that reverse Sobolev inequalities of
order $\gamma\in(\frac{n}{2},\frac{n}{2}+1)$ on the $n$-sphere can be readily
derived from the reversed HLS inequalities. For the case
$\gamma\in(\frac{n}{2}+1,\frac{n}{2}+2)$, we present a simple proof of reverse
Sobolev inequalities by using the center of mass condition introduced by Hang.
In addition, applying this approach, we establish the quantitative stability of
reverse Sobolev inequalities of order $\gamma\in(\frac{n}{2}+1,\frac{n}{2}+2)$
with explicit lower bounds. Finally, by using conformally covariant boundary
operators and reverse Sobolev inequalities, we derive Sobolev trace
inequalities on the unit ball.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了反向Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev不等式与反向Sobolev不等式之间的联系，并给出了反向Sobolev不等式的定量稳定性估计。
AI.motivation: 针对Frank等人关于反向HLS不等式与反向Sobolev不等式无关的论断，本文旨在揭示两者之间的内在联系，并研究反向Sobolev不等式的稳定性问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Hang引入的质心条件、共形协变边界算子、定量稳定性分析方法，以及通过反向HLS不等式推导反向Sobolev不等式的技巧。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对于γ∈(n/2, n/2+1)，从反向HLS不等式推导反向Sobolev不等式；2) 对于γ∈(n/2+1, n/2+2)，利用质心条件给出反向Sobolev不等式的简单证明；3) 建立γ∈(n/2+1, n/2+2)时反向Sobolev不等式的定量稳定性；4) 在单位球上推导Sobolev迹不等式。
AI.significance: 澄清了反向HLS不等式与反向Sobolev不等式的关系，发展了反向Sobolev不等式的稳定性理论，为相关几何分析和PDE研究提供了新工具。

title: Travelling waves in non-local reaction-dispersion equations with diffuse   levy measures
summary:
In this paper, we focus on the existence of propagation fronts, solutions to
non-local dispersion reaction models. Our aim is to provide a unified proof of
this existence in a very broad framework using simple real analysis tools. In
particular, we review the results that already exist in the literature and
complete the table. It appears that the most important case is that of a
bistable nonlinearity, which we then extend to other classical nonlinearities.

AI.tldr: 为具有非局部扩散的反应模型提供传播前沿解存在性的统一证明框架
AI.motivation: 研究非局部扩散反应模型中传播前沿解的存在性问题，旨在在非常广泛的框架下提供统一的存在性证明，并完善文献中已有的结果
AI.techniques: 使用简单的实分析工具，重点关注双稳态非线性情形，并将其扩展到其他经典非线性类型
AI.main_theorems: 为双稳态非线性提供传播前沿解的存在性证明，并将结果扩展到其他经典非线性情形，完善了该领域的理论框架
AI.significance: 为非局部扩散反应模型中的传播前沿问题提供了统一的理论框架，简化了证明方法，完善了该领域的理论体系，对理解非局部扩散系统中的波传播现象具有重要意义

title: The square sticky disk: crystallization and Gamma-convergence to the   octagonal anisotropic perimeter
summary:
We consider a variant of the sticky disk energy where distances between
particles are evaluated through the sup norm $\lVert\cdot\rVert_\infty$ in the
plane. We first prove crystallization of minimizers in the square lattice, for
any fixed number $N$ of particles. Then we consider the limit as $N\to\infty$:
in contrast to the standard sticky disk, there is only one orientation in the
limit, and we are able to compute explicitly the $\Gamma$-limit to be an
anisotropic perimeter with octagonal Wulff shape. The results are based on an
energy decomposition for graphs that generalizes the one proved by De
Luca-Friesecke [J. Nonlinear Sci. 28 (2018), 69-90] in the triangular case.

AI.tldr: 证明了在sup范数下的粘性圆盘能量极小化问题中，粒子结晶为正方形晶格，并计算了N→∞时的Γ-极限为具有八边形Wulff形状的各向异性周长泛函。
AI.motivation: 研究粘性圆盘能量在sup范数下的变体，探索粒子系统在不同距离度量下的结晶行为，特别是与标准粘性圆盘（使用欧几里得范数）的对比。
AI.techniques: 推广了De Luca-Friesecke在三角晶格情形下的能量分解方法，建立了适用于正方形晶格的图能量分解技术，并运用Γ-收敛理论分析极限行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对任意固定粒子数N，极小化子结晶为正方形晶格；2) N→∞时，极限只有一个取向；3) 显式计算了Γ-极限为具有八边形Wulff形状的各向异性周长泛函。
AI.significance: 揭示了距离度量对结晶结构的影响，证明了sup范数导致正方形晶格而非三角晶格，为理解粒子系统的几何约束与能量最小化提供了新视角。

title: On the decay of mass with respect to an invariant measure for semilinear   heat equations in exterior domains
summary:
The paper concerns with the decay property of solutions to the
initial-boundary value problem of the semilinear heat equation
$\partial_tu-\Delta u+u^p=0$ in exterior domains $\Omega$ in $\mathbb{R}^N$
($N\geq 2$). The problem for the one-dimensional case is formulated with
$\Omega=(0,\infty)$ which is one of the representative of the connected
components in $\mathbb{R}$. One can see that the $C_0$-semigroup for the
corresponding linear problem possesses an invariant measure $\phi(x)\,dx$,
where $\phi$ is a positive harmonic function satisfying the Dirichlet boundary
condition. This paper clarifies that the mass of solutions with respect to the
measure $\phi(x)\,dx$ vanishes as $t\to \infty$ if and only if $1<p\leq
\min\{2,1+\frac{2}{N}\}$. In the other case $p>\min\{2,1+\frac{2}{N}\}$, we
prove that all solutions are asymptotically free. The asymptotic profile is
actually given by a modification with Gaussian when $N\geq 3$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了外区域上半线性热方程解的衰减性质，建立了质量衰减与渐近自由性的临界指数条件。
AI.motivation: 研究外区域上半线性热方程∂_tu-Δu+u^p=0的长时间行为，特别关注解的质量（相对于不变测度）衰减与渐近自由性之间的临界现象。
AI.techniques: 使用C_0-半群理论、不变测度方法、调和函数构造、渐近分析以及临界指数分类技术。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了质量衰减的充要条件：当且仅当1<p≤min{2,1+2/N}时，解相对于不变测度φ(x)dx的质量趋于零；当p>min{2,1+2/N}时，所有解都是渐近自由的，且在N≥3时渐近轮廓由修正的高斯函数给出。
AI.significance: 为外区域上半线性热方程的长时间行为提供了完整的分类理论，揭示了非线性项指数p在临界值处的相变现象，扩展了经典热方程理论到具有非线性耗散的情形。

title: Convergence of thresholding energies for anisotropic mean curvature flow   on inhomogeneous obstacle
summary:
We extend the analysis by Esedo\={g}lu and Otto (2015) of thresholding
energies for the celebrated multiphase Bence-Merriman-Osher algorithm for
computing mean curvature flow of interfacial networks, to the case of differing
space-dependent anisotropies. In particular, we address the special setting of
an obstacle problem, where anisotropic particles move on an inhomogeneous
substrate. By suitable modification of the surface energies we construct an
approximate energy that uses a single convolution kernel and is monotone with
respect to the convolution width. This allows us to prove that the approximate
energies $\Gamma$-converge to their sharp interface counterpart.

AI.tldr: 将阈值能量分析推广到具有空间依赖各向异性的多相BMO算法，建立了障碍问题中异质基底上各向异性粒子运动的数学框架。
AI.motivation: 研究多相Bence-Merriman-Osher算法在具有空间依赖各向异性的界面网络计算中的应用，特别关注异质基底上各向异性粒子运动的障碍问题。
AI.techniques: 阈值能量分析、Γ-收敛理论、单卷积核构造、能量单调性证明、各向异性表面能修正。
AI.main_theorems: 构建了使用单卷积核的近似能量，证明了其关于卷积宽度的单调性，并建立了近似能量到尖锐界面对应能量的Γ-收敛性。
AI.significance: 为异质基底上各向异性粒子运动的数值模拟提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了BMO算法在复杂各向异性环境中的应用范围。

title: Uniqueness of solutions for the logarithmic Schr\"{o}dinger equation
summary:
We consider the Cauchy problem for the logarithmic Schr\"odinger equation and
prove uniqueness of weak $H^s(\mathbb{R}^d)$ solutions for $s\in(0,1)$, which
improves on the previous uniqueness result in $H^1(\mathbb{R}^d)$. The proof is
achieved by combining a nontrivial use of integral equations, local smoothing
estimates, and quantitative estimates of the sublinear effect of the
nonlinearity, based on the localization argument. We also study uniqueness on
the torus and uniqueness of the equation perturbed by pure power
nonlinearities.

AI.tldr: 证明了对数薛定谔方程在弱解空间H^s(R^d)中对于s∈(0,1)的唯一性，改进了先前仅适用于H^1的唯一性结果
AI.motivation: 对数薛定谔方程是量子力学和光学中的重要模型，具有独特的对数非线性项。先前唯一性结果仅限于H^1空间，需要扩展至更低正则性的弱解空间，以更完整地理解方程的解结构
AI.techniques: 结合积分方程的非平凡应用、局部光滑估计、非线性项次线性效应的定量估计，以及基于局部化论证的分析框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在H^s(R^d)空间(s∈(0,1))中证明了对数薛定谔方程弱解的唯一性；2. 研究了环面上的唯一性问题；3. 分析了带有纯幂非线性扰动的方程的唯一性
AI.significance: 将对数薛定谔方程的唯一性理论从H^1空间扩展到更低正则性的H^s空间，为理解该方程的解性质提供了更完整的理论框架，同时为处理类似非线性薛定谔方程的唯一性问题提供了新的技术方法

title: Carleman estimate for full-discrete approximations of the complex   Ginzburg-Landau equation with dynamic boundary conditions and applications to   controllability
summary:
In this paper, we investigate Carleman estimate and controllability result
for the fully-discrete approximations of a one-dimensional Ginzburg-Landau
equation with dynamic boundary conditions. We first establish a new discrete
Carleman estimate for the corresponding adjoint system. Based on this Carleman
estimate, we obtain a relaxed observability inequality for the adjoint system,
and then a controllability result for the fully-discrete Ginzburg-Landau
equation with dynamic boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 建立了带动态边界条件的完全离散Ginzburg-Landau方程的Carleman估计和可控性结果
AI.motivation: 研究带动态边界条件的Ginzburg-Landau方程的完全离散逼近的控制问题，这类方程在超导、相变等物理现象中具有重要应用，动态边界条件增加了问题的复杂性
AI.techniques: 离散Carleman估计方法、对偶系统分析、松弛可观测性不等式、完全离散格式的数值分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了对应对偶系统的新离散Carleman估计；2. 基于Carleman估计得到了对偶系统的松弛可观测性不等式；3. 证明了完全离散Ginzburg-Landau方程带动态边界条件的可控性结果
AI.significance: 将连续系统的Carleman估计技术推广到离散框架，为数值控制理论提供理论基础，对带动态边界条件的偏微分方程数值控制具有重要理论价值

title: On conditional uniqueness of solutions to stochastic Navier-Stokes   Equations
summary:
This paper is a continuation of [26]. Here theorems on conditional uniqueness
and regularity for solutions to stochastic Navier-Stokes equations in $\mathbb
R^d$ are presented.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了随机Navier-Stokes方程在$\mathbb{R}^d$中解的条件唯一性和正则性
AI.motivation: 作为[26]的延续，研究随机Navier-Stokes方程解的唯一性和正则性问题，这是流体力学中重要的数学基础问题
AI.techniques: 随机偏微分方程理论，可能包括鞅方法、随机分析、能量估计等随机PDE技术
AI.main_theorems: 关于随机Navier-Stokes方程解的条件唯一性和正则性定理
AI.significance: 深化了对随机流体动力学方程解性质的理解，为随机Navier-Stokes方程的适定性理论提供重要结果

title: Attractors for the Navier--Stokes--Voight equations and their dimension
summary:
The Voight regularization of the Navier--Stokes system is studied in a
bounded domain and on the torus. In the 3D case we obtain new explicit bounds
for the attractor dimension improving the previously known results. In the 2D
case we show that the estimates so obtained converge to the known estimates for
the attractor of the Navier--Stokes system as the regularization parameter
tends to zero both for the Dirichlet and the periodic boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 通过Voight正则化研究Navier-Stokes系统的吸引子维数估计，在3D中获得改进的显式界，在2D中证明当正则化参数趋于零时估计收敛到Navier-Stokes系统的已知结果。
AI.motivation: 研究Navier-Stokes系统的Voight正则化模型，该模型在流体力学中用于数值模拟和理论分析，特别是在处理湍流和吸引子维数估计方面。核心问题是理解正则化参数对系统动力学和吸引子结构的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用Voight正则化技术，结合吸引子维数估计的Lyapunov指数方法，在有限域和环面上进行分析。涉及正则化参数渐近分析，比较Dirichlet边界条件和周期边界条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 3D情况下获得Voight正则化Navier-Stokes系统吸引子维数的新显式界，改进了先前已知结果；2. 2D情况下证明当正则化参数趋于零时，估计收敛到经典Navier-Stokes系统的已知吸引子维数估计，对Dirichlet和周期边界条件均成立。
AI.significance: 为Voight正则化模型提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了正则化参数与系统动力学之间的定量关系。改进的3D吸引子维数估计对湍流理论有重要意义，而2D的收敛性结果验证了正则化方法的合理性，为数值模拟提供了理论支持。
